title: austromyrtus hillii
intro: Austromyrtus hillii, also known as the midyim berry, is a small shrub native to the eastern coast of Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Austromyrtus hillii include treating wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Austromyrtus hillii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
